title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0857
summary: Shyam Bihari Sah, the husband of the complainant, was accused under IPC Section 498A and Sections 3/4 of the Dowry Prohibition Act for assaulting and attempting to kill his wife. The petitioner claimed the allegations were false and that he was willing to keep his wife with dignity and care.
